/usr/bin/ar cr ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a  CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/access/ti_asm.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/access/ti_bundle.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/access/ti_latency.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/access/ti_errors.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/topcode.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_subset.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_properties.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_enums.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_hazards.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_lits.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_print.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_pack.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_operands.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_registers.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_pseudo.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_abi_properties.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_isa_bundle.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_proc.c.o CMakeFiles/targinfo-mips.dir/mips/targ_proc_properties.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a
